content.hint: 用礼貌表达需求的常用结构是 I'd like to...

blanks.answer: I'd like to see the new action movie
options: I want to watch the new action movie
Can I see the new action movie
I'm looking for the new action movie
I'd like to see the new action movie

content.situation: 顾客走进电影院售票处，向售票员打招呼并表达想看一部新上映的电影
content.speakerText: Hi there! What can I get for you today?

content.hint: 礼貌请求特定场次常用 Can I get... 结构

blanks.answer: Can I get the earlier one
options: Can I take the earlier one
Could you give me the earlier one
Can I get the earlier one

content.situation: 售票员告知多个场次后，顾客希望选择一个合适的时段，但不想太晚
content.speakerText: We have showings at several times tonight. Which one works best for you?
content.speakerTextCn: 今天晚上有几个场次，您选哪个最合适？
content.responseTemplate: ___? I'd prefer not to stay out too late.

content.hint: 询问是否存在某种服务或选项时，常用 Do you have...？

blanks.answer: Do you have the premium version
options: Do you have the premium version
Is it possible to get the premium version
Can I have the premium version

content.situation: 顾客想确认是否提供某种观影体验，比如3D或IMAX
content.speakerText: We have standard and premium options available.
content.speakerTextCn: 我们有普通厅和高级厅可选。
content.responseTemplate: ___? I'd love to experience it in the best quality.

content.hint: 表达意愿时的固定搭配
content.template: I'd like ___ see the new Spider-Man, please.
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（预约场景核心句型）

content.hint: 特指上文提到的某个具体场次
content.knowledgePoint: 定冠词 the 用于特指（已提及的场次）

content.hint: 口语中 'What are you going to...' 的缩略形式
content.template: Hi! What ___ you gonna watch today?
content.knowledgePoint: 口语缩略形式：What're you gonna = What are you going to
